label.description: Accessible label for the chart. Required for screen readers.

description.description: Optional description rendered below the label.

label.description: Time-axis label for this frame, e.g. '0 ms' or 't=0'.

bins.description:
Magnitude values per frequency bin. A consistent length across frames is
preferred, but ragged frames are supported: the grid uses the maximum bin
count across all frames and renders any missing bins in shorter frames as
"missing" cells. Non-finite values (NaN/Infinity) also render as missing.

frames.description: Ordered sequence of time-indexed frames. Each frame contains a label and an array of per-frequency-bin magnitudes.

frequencyLabels.description: Optional frequency-bin labels for the y-axis (e.g. ['100 Hz', '200 Hz', …]). When omitted, bins are labelled by index.

height.description: Pixel height of the chart. Default `200`.

loading.description: Whether the chart is in a loading state. Default `false`.

dataTableCaption.description: Custom data table caption; falls back to `label`.

class.description: Custom class applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Snippet rendered when there are no frames.
